codeReview.summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and current writer implementation. The earlier blocking issue is fixed: resolution now gates on stored bot-owned discussion rows before calling GitLab resolve, and current tests cover the intended summary-note and discussion-resolution behaviors.

summary: Pass. The feature now posts one terminal summary note (including clean runs and parser-error notes), resolves only persisted bot-owned discussions for fixed/stale/superseded findings, handles already-resolved discussions as no-ops, and links superseded discussions to replacement threads. No remaining blocking or non-blocking feature-scope issues were found in the reviewed code.
